sqlMap.select: select QuotationEstimationKey, PolicyKey, VersionSequence, TransactionSequence, TotalPremium, TotalPremiumFirstRange, TotalPolicyTaxAmount, InvoicedPremium, TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, IsDollarDefense, AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, IsMinimumPremium, XmlOutputDatafromRating, XmlInputDatatoRating, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionKey, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from QuotationEstimation where QuotationEstimationKey = #QuotationEstimationKey#
sqlMap.update:
update QuotationEstimation set
PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# PolicyKey = null VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# VersionSequence = null TransactionSequence = #TransactionSequence# TransactionSequence = null TotalPremium = #TotalPremium# TotalPremium = null TotalPremiumFirstRange = #TotalPremiumFirstRange# TotalPremiumFirstRange = null TotalPolicyTaxAmount = #TotalPolicyTaxAmount# TotalPolicyTaxAmount = null InvoicedPremium = #InvoicedPremium# InvoicedPremium = null TotalPolicyModifierPercentage = #TotalPolicyModifierPercentage# TotalPolicyModifierPercentage = null IsClaimOptionType = #IsClaimOptionType# IsClaimOptionType = null IsClaimExpensesType = #IsClaimExpensesType# IsClaimExpensesType = null IsDollarDefense = #IsDollarDefense# IsDollarDefense = null AggregateLimit = #AggregateLimit# AggregateLimit = null OccuranceLimit = #OccuranceLimit# OccuranceLimit = null AggregateDeductible = #AggregateDeductible# AggregateDeductible = null OccuranceDeductible = #OccuranceDeductible# OccuranceDeductible = null IsMinimumPremium = #IsMinimumPremium# IsMinimumPremium = null XmlOutputDatafromRating = #XmlOutputDatafromRating# XmlOutputDatafromRating = null XmlInputDatatoRating = #XmlInputDatatoRating# XmlInputDatatoRating = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null VersionKey = #VersionKey# VersionKey = null CreatedDate = #CreatedDate# CreatedDate = null CreatedBy = #CreatedBy# CreatedBy = null
where QuotationEstimationKey = #QuotationEstimationKey#
sqlMap.select: select QuotationEstimationKey, PolicyKey, VersionSequence, TransactionSequence, TotalPremium, TotalPremiumFirstRange, TotalPolicyTaxAmount, InvoicedPremium, TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, IsDollarDefense, AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, IsMinimumPremium, XmlOutputDatafromRating, XmlInputDatatoRating, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionKey, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from QuotationEstimation where QuotationEstimationKey = #QuotationEstimationKey#

select QuotationEstimationKey, PolicyKey, VersionSequence, TransactionSequence, TotalPremium, TotalPremiumFirstRange, TotalPolicyTaxAmount, InvoicedPremium, TotalPolicyModifierPercentage, IsClaimOptionType, IsClaimExpensesType, IsDollarDefense, AggregateLimit, OccuranceLimit, AggregateDeductible, OccuranceDeductible, IsMinimumPremium, XmlOutputDatafromRating, XmlInputDatatoRating, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionKey, CreatedDate, CreatedBy from QuotationEstimation
